nasb.text: The tents of the destroyers prosper, And those who provoke God are secure, Whom God brings into their power.

esv.text: The tents of robbers are at peace, and those who provoke God are secure, who bring their god in their hand.

cnv.text: 強盜的帳幕興旺， 惹　神發怒的安穩， 　神的手賞賜他們。

ccb.text: 强盗的帐篷太平， 冒犯上帝、手捧神像的人安稳。
